title: melissitus ruthenicus
intro: Melissitus ruthenicus, also known as the Russian melissa, is a flowering plant species within the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Melissitus ruthenicus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Melissitus ruthenicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and support overall well-being.
